expectations.text: Re-engagement flow that acknowledges the silence and offers a reason to return
expectations.evidence: Email 1 explicitly acknowledges 'It's been a couple of months since you last logged in' and Email 2 provides new features as a reason to return.

expectations.text: Makes both staying and leaving easy
expectations.evidence: Email 4 (Final Notice) explicitly says 'you can [cancel / pause / keep your account at no cost — whatever applies]' making leaving easy alongside the re-engagement CTA.

expectations.text: Ends with suppression/removal of non-responders to protect deliverability
expectations.evidence: Post-sequence action explicitly states 'No response after Email 4: Remove from active marketing sends. Keep in a suppressed segment.'
Emails use empathetic language ('I know life gets busy'), avoid repeated pressure tactics, and the final email explicitly closes with 'This is the last email I'll send about coming back.'
